commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 07 Jul

US equities maintain dominant liquidity leadership, with NYSE's ILLIQ of 0.0014 and AR spread of 0.4548% substantially outperforming all peers. Nasdaq 100 ranks second, though its Roll spread widens to 1.73%. The LSE significantly lags the ranking, exhibiting an ILLIQ metric nearly 88 times higher than NYSE and AR spread of 0.8370%, suggesting materially wider effective spreads and lower trading efficiency despite comparable Roll spread performance.
